name: Psanan
street_level_visibility: Drow, Duergar, Deep Gnomes, Kuo-Toa, and Derro form the dominant Underdark base; Humans, Tieflings, and Yuan-Ti remain permanent secondary surface-facing and port-facing populations.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Psanan should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
